name: Freezer Manicotti
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the ricotta cheese and two eggs.
2. Add chopped parsley to the mixture.
3. Place the mixture into a gallon-sized freezer bag.
4. Cut the tip off one corner of the bag to create a piping attachment.
5. Pipe the cheese mixture into the manicotti shells.
6. Place the filled shells in an aluminum casserole pan.
7. Cover with spaghetti sauce and top with mozzarella and parmesan cheese.
8. Cover and freeze.
